Robotics Case

Lightweight Joint Connection Plate for Robotics

joint connection / weight reduction / hole-position accuracy

IndustriesRobotics
Part Functionjoint connection / weight reduction / hole-position accuracy
Manufacturing Capabilitiesaluminum CNC machining, pocketing, precision holes, deburring and inspection reporting

Project Scenario

The joint connection plate balanced weight reduction with mounting strength for a robotic arm structure.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The completed plates gave the customer a lighter connection solution while preserving key assembly positions.
